evals.name: java-hexagonal-template-fill
evals.prompt:
You're filling a PR template for a Java feature. Here's what you have:

**Branch:** feature/TASK-456

**PR Template:**
```
# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Code refactor
- [ ] Dependency update

## Architecture Compliance
- [ ] Follows hexagonal architecture (ports & adapters)
- [ ] New features in feature packages
- [ ] Controllers depend on input ports
- [ ] Services implement ports

## Testing Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added
- [ ] Integration tests added
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] 100% coverage

## Issue Link
[JIRA-TICKET](www.jira.com/TASK-X)
```

**Simulated Git Changes:**
- Branch name: feature/TASK-456
- Modified files: src/payment/PaymentService.java, src/payment/ports/PaymentPort.java, src/payment/adapters/PaymentGatewayAdapter.java
- Added files: tests/PaymentServiceTest.java, tests/PaymentIntegrationTest.java
- Changed files summary: 5 files (2 services, 1 port interface, 1 adapter, 2 test files)
- Recent commits: "Add payment gateway port interface", "Implement PaymentGatewayAdapter", "Add comprehensive tests for payment feature"

Fill this PR template intelligently. The issue link should detect TASK-456 from the branch name and populate it dynamically.
evals.expected_output: PR description with: (1) description summarizing payment feature, (2) [x] New feature marked, (3) [x] Architecture compliance boxes checked, (4) [x] Testing boxes checked, (5) [TASK-456](www.jira.com/TASK-456) with URL updated, (6) test case suggestions with curl examples

evals.name: custom-prefix-bugfix-fill
evals.prompt:
Fill a PR template with a bugfix. Here's the context:

**Branch:** feature/PEPE-789

**PR Template:**
```
# Pull Request

## Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Code refactor

## Issue Reference
[PEPE-TICKET](company.jira.com/browse/PEPE-X)

## Tests
- [ ] Added regression tests
- [ ] Added new tests
- [ ] All pass
```

**Simulated Git Changes:**
- Branch: feature/PEPE-789
- Modified files: src/cache/CacheService.java, docs/CACHE.md
- Added files: tests/CacheRegressionTest.java
- Commits: "Fix cache invalidation race condition", "Add regression tests", "Update cache documentation"

Fill the template. The custom PEPE- prefix should be detected and the URL should update from PEPE-X to PEPE-789.
evals.expected_output: PR description with: (1) description of cache bugfix, (2) [x] Bug fix marked, (3) [x] Added regression tests marked, (4) [PEPE-789](company.jira.com/browse/PEPE-789) with dynamic URL, (5) regression test suggestions

evals.name: no-template-refactor-fill
evals.prompt:
Create a PR description when there's NO template provided:

**Branch:** feature/improve-docs (no issue number)

**Template:** None available

**Simulated Git Changes:**
- Branch: feature/improve-docs
- Modified files: README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, src/utils/Logger.java
- Changed lines: 150 lines added/modified
- Commits: "Refactor logging utilities", "Update architecture documentation", "Improve README clarity"

Create a clean PR description without a template. Focus on summarizing the changes and suggesting regression tests (since it's a refactor).
evals.expected_output: PR description with: (1) clear summary of documentation + refactor work, (2) categorized changes (Docs, Refactors), (3) regression test suggestions, (4) ready for push/save decision
